scripts.prepare-seed: yarn workspace @pipod/board build-only && yarn workspace @pipod/dashboard build-only && OUT_DIR=standalone/launcher/resources/seed node scripts/build-manifest.mjs
scripts.build: yarn type-check && yarn workspace @pipod/board build-only && yarn workspace @pipod/console build-only
scripts.type-check: yarn workspace @pipod/shared type-check && yarn workspace @pipod/server type-check && yarn workspace @pipod/board type-check && yarn workspace @pipod/console type-check && yarn workspace @pipod/dashboard type-check && yarn workspace @pipod/launcher typecheck
